rationale: Review 2's finding is real and material: the fiberHomeomorph proof term (Deck.lean:73) uses `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` (not `simp only`) to close a non-rfl membership goal, which implicitly depends on ambient simp lemmas including Set.mem_singleton_iff and is thus more brittle than the targeted rfl/rw/simp patterns elsewhere. Acting on it yields an explicitly robust proof (or Iff.intro style); acting on Review 1's "approve, no findings" leaves the unnecessary fragility.
